description: Segal Marco Advisors is one of the largest, SEC-registered, employee-owned investment consulting firms in the US, in business for more than 55 years. We deliver trusted advice to more than 450 institutional investors, including multiemployer benefit funds, state and local governments, corporations, nonprofit organizations, endowments and foundations. Our combined advisory assets exceed $600 billion. Organizations place their trust in us to help them make sound decisions that have an impact on millions of lives. Our senior professionals have guided clients through all market conditions.
